headline: Publication of the French version of Tikehau Capital’s 2025 Universal Registration Document
summary: PARIS, March 19, 2026--Regulatory News: Tikehau Capital (Paris:TKO) today announces that the French version of its 2025 Universal Registration Document (Document d’enregistrement universel) is available to the public and has been filed with the French Financial Markets Authority (Autorité des marchés financiers) under number D.26-0116.
